isi.lyrics:
Lyric MOONY - SOMEDAY(언젠가는)

Romanization

neujeotda saenggakdoelttae meolliwatda neukkilttae
neon ureodo doe
naega da deureojulkke
jinayahaneun muneun neul hangsang dathyeoisseo
eonjena salmeun geureoge heulleogaji ireoge
Someday naega wonhandaero
Someday naega geurindaero
nan kkumbakke kkul su eopseo
naega wonhandaero naega geurindaero Someday

gaboji aneun goseul gal su itdago mideo
namdeuldo gakkeum sumswigi himdeulkkeoya ireoge
Oh Someday naega wonhandaero
Someday naega geurindaero
sesangi nal morachyeodo
muneojiji malgo seureojiji malgo Someday

Someday
nummuri namyeon keuge ureo beorigo
Someday geurae gaboneunggeoya
Someday neomu geokjeonghajima
nan kkumbakke kkul su eopseo
naega wonhandaero naega geurindaero
geureoge nan mideo Someday


Hangeul

늦었다 생각될때 멀리왔다 느낄때
넌 울어도 되
내가 다 들어줄께
지나야하는 문은 늘 항상 닫혀있어
언제나 삶은 그렇게 흘러가지 이렇게
Someday 내가 원한대로
Someday 내가 그린대로
난 꿈밖에 꿀 수 없어
내가 원한대로 내가 그린대로 Someday

가보지 않은 곳을 갈 수 있다고 믿어
남들도 가끔 숨쉬기 힘들꺼야 이렇게
Oh Someday 내가 원한대로
Someday 내가 그린대로
세상이 날 몰아쳐도
무너지지 말고 스러지지 말고 Someday

Someday
눈물이 나면 크게 울어 버리고
Someday 그래 가보는거야
Someday 너무 걱정하지마
난 꿈밖에 꿀 수 없어
내가 원한대로 내가 그린대로
그렇게 난 믿어 Someday

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YOUS - LOVE FLU (Feat. simaron) [Korean Ver]

Romanization

neol bon sunggan mami bung tteo
nae maeum soge ullyeochin jong
jakku tteoolla swimi eopseo
neoui baljagugeul ttara maeil
gati geonneun sangsangeul hae
sarang, mitji anteon nayeonneunde
gappi ttwineun simjangeun haee daa
dara oreun yeol, teojil geot gata
Oh you
Falling for you
Right back — tell me that you feel it too
Timeless — I could give it all to you
Ooh, love's a flu

You—

jidokhan flu, love you, baby
Stay by my side (your side)
Though pain strikes
Love ya

달아 오른 열, 터질 것 같아

isi.lyrics:
Lyric YOUS - LOVE FLU (Feat. simaron)

Romanization

You came in, and I like that
He likes me, and I like back
Oh, you're my lullaby
Who's there?
Used to guard my heart from love
Pretend like I don’t give a what
But I can't deny these feelings, baby
Runnin’ wild, my heart beats so loud
'Til the morning light, I'm up in the clouds
To you
Falling for you
Right back — tell me that you feel it too
Timeless — I could give it all to you
Ooh, love's a flu
Can’t walk away when your so close
You—
Make me wanna run into you
Make me wanna dream of you ooh
Deadly flu, love you, baby
You’re like the heat of June that came to me
It lights me up just like a flame
You made my heart ache
You gave me a fever-thrill, she's so unreal
You're the only one that heals me, you're my vaccine
If you hold me close, I’m gon’ surrender baby
Even for a moment, if you’re far away
Your warmth just keeps on haunting me every day
Runnin’ wild, my heart beats so loud
'Til the morning light, I'm up in the clouds
To you
Falling for you
Right back — tell me that you feel it too
Timeless — I could give it all to you
Ooh, love's a flu
Can’t walk away when your so close
You—
Make me wanna run into you
Make me wanna dream of you ooh
Deadly flu, love you, baby
Stay by my side (your side)
Though pain strikes
Love ya
Heatin' for you, love you baby

isi.lyrics:
Lyric GREENY - Momo

Romanization

I took off my shoes, and left the road
Where the grass grows wild,
where time moves slow
Birds don’t ask me who I am
They just sing and I just ran

No walls, no names, no heavy breath
I found my home in silence and depth
No rules, no clocks, just wind and skin
And I begin to breathe again

I grew where silence kissed the ground
My roots are deep, my voice is sound
No more roads, no need to try
The trees remember why I cry

The stars don’t scare me like before
The dark is kind, I need no door

No walls, no names, no heavy breath
I found my home in silence and depth
No rules, no clocks, just wind and skin
And I begin to breathe again

I grew where silence kissed the ground
My roots are deep, my voice is sound
No more roads, no need to try
The trees remember why I cry

Let them call me lost and small
I was never theirs at all
Let them call me lost and small
I was never theirs at all

I grew where silence kissed the ground
My roots are deep, my voice is sound
No more roads, no need to try
The trees remember why I cry

Hangeul

Let them call me lost and small

isi.lyrics:
Lyric KozyPop - 말해줘 (Just Tell Me) (Song By CHOIEO) (Prod. RYUKIE, JooC)

Romanization

soljikhage nae maeum malhamyeon
amu sai aniralkka bwa
useoneomgyeo mareun mot haedo
sarang ttawin mot mangneundago
dapdaphae ireoge nae maeumeun deo
uriui sarangeun ne maeumeul jom deo
ireoge jeoreoge hetgallyeo deo
ireoge deo jeoreoge deo
hoksi jigeum mangseorigo itdamyeon
uri sai ne mam gatjin aneulgeol?
naneun dareul geoya jinsimiran mariya
ijeneun soljikhage malhaejwo
oneureun
naega jinsimeul jeonhaetgo
naeireun nega malhaejwo
urin dareul geoya jinjihadan mariya
deo isang mangseoriji mara jwo
geurae soljikhan yaegil hamyeon
neowa nae saineun jom dareul geol
jinjja moreugesseo uri dul saireul
I need you to know
Just tell me a little of your truth
All I need is your love
ne maeum naege malhaejundamyeon
urineun jogeum deo gipeojilgeol?
Just tell me a little of your truth
I’m ready to give you my love
nega nae maeum arajundamyeon
nan jom deo nege soljikhaejilgeol?
hwaksini piryohae ajikdo deo

속을 아파하다가
이것만 딱 마시고나면
쓰렸던 느낌이 사라질까봐
널 베었던 손에 베였다
날 보내줘 너를 사랑했던

At that time
We just too young 
and it's time to good bye
너를 너무나 사랑했지만 
널 떼놓는 내 가슴이 아파

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Yang Jung Mo - 너라는 계절 (The Season of You)

Romanization

cheonnune banjjagin sunggan
meomchwo itdeon sigani
ne ireumeul bureumyeo
saeropge heureugi sijakhae

ajik natseoreodo
nae mameun neoro gadeuk cha
kkeuteomneun gyejeol soge
neowa namanui kkochi pieo

seuchyeo jinagadeon naldeuri
modu neoro hyanghaewa
meomchul su eomneun tteollim
jigeum neoege daa

neoraneun gyejeori naege wa
saehayan kkochipi heutnallyeo
modeun duryeoumdo
balgeun bicheuro bakkwo

neoraneun gyejeori naege wa
nae sesangeul muldeuryeo
cheoeum bon geu sunggambuteo
neol saranghaesseotdago malhallae

paran haneul arae
urin kkeuteopsi georeoga
jogeum neuryeodo gwaenchana
hamkkeramyeon chungbunhae

heutnallineun i baram soge
neowa nae mami seokkyeo
meomchul su eomneun norae
nan sarangeul bulleo

neoraneun gyejeori naege wa
saehayan kkochipi heutnallyeo
modeun duryeoumdo
balgeun bicheuro bakkwo

neoraneun gyejeori naege wa
nae sesangeul muldeuryeo
cheoeum bon geu sunggambuteo
neol jikyeojugo sipeosseo

eonjengga meolli tteoreojyeodo
sarajiji aneul geoya
nae ane yeongwonhi
neoraneun gyejeori sara

neoraneun gyejeori naege wa
kkeuteomneun kkotgireul bakhyeojwo
eojeui apeumkkaji
oneureun chueogi doeeo

neoraneun gyejeori naege wa
nae siganeul meomchwo
cheoeum bon geu sunggambuteo
neol saranghaesseotdago malhallae

Hangeul

첫눈에 반짝인 순간
멈춰 있던 시간이
네 이름을 부르며
새롭게 흐르기 시작해

아직 낯설어도
내 맘은 너로 가득 차
끝없는 계절 속에
너와 나만의 꽃이 피어

스쳐 지나가던 날들이
모두 너로 향해와
멈출 수 없는 떨림
지금 너에게 닿아

너라는 계절이 내게 와
새하얀 꽃잎이 흩날려
모든 두려움도
밝은 빛으로 바꿔

너라는 계절이 내게 와
내 세상을 물들여
처음 본 그 순간부터
널 사랑했었다고 말할래

파란 하늘 아래
우린 끝없이 걸어가
조금 느려도 괜찮아
함께라면 충분해

흩날리는 이 바람 속에
너와 내 맘이 섞여
멈출 수 없는 노래
난 사랑을 불러

너라는 계절이 내게 와
새하얀 꽃잎이 흩날려
모든 두려움도
밝은 빛으로 바꿔

너라는 계절이 내게 와
내 세상을 물들여
처음 본 그 순간부터
널 지켜주고 싶었어

언젠가 멀리 떨어져도
사라지지 않을 거야
내 안에 영원히
너라는 계절이 살아

너라는 계절이 내게 와
끝없는 꽃길을 밝혀줘
어제의 아픔까지
오늘은 추억이 되어

너라는 계절이 내게 와
내 시간을 멈춰
처음 본 그 순간부터
널 사랑했었다고 말할래

심장 터질듯이

희미한 빛을 따라 그저 걸어갈뿐이야

Trapped inside my head
Lost my mind 
Heart confined 
손끝에 닿을 듯한 하루 속에

Locked inside myself 
Lost my way
Fading light
흐릿한 기억 속을 걸어
다시 또

isi.lyrics:
Lyric Hwina - Wildfire

Romanization

She walks in with a spark in the night
Neon signs flicker, soft and bright
Whispers drift and tangle in the air
Her crooked grin hides secrets rare

Oh she’s a wildfire burning free
A daring heart that beats with me
Her pulse flows through the city light
She owns the streets, tonight

Every move she makes feels like art
A fleeting glance that stirs your heart
Dreams shimmer beneath the open skies
Her spark ignites where shadow lies

Oh she’s a wildfire, wild and free
A daring heart that beats with me
Her pulse flows through the city light
She owns the streets tonight

Time slows down as the music plays
Her laughter winds through crowded ways
Echoes of her laugh and smile I can’t forget
A flash of gold that lingers yet

Oh she’s a wildfire, lighting bright
A daring heart that beats with me
Her pulse flows through the city light
She owns the streets, tonight
